intended_use: The X9 Ultrasound System is intended for ultrasound imaging of validated vascular accesses for hemodialysis during the preliminary stage of a cannulation procedure, prior to inserting the needle. The
intended_use_full: The X9 Ultrasound System is intended for ultrasound imaging of validated vascular accesses for hemodialysis during the preliminary stage of a cannulation procedure, prior to inserting the needle. The device is intended to be used by qualified healthcare professionals in a medical setting. The device is not intended to be used to diagnose the position of the vascular access without confirming position per standard of care. The X9 Ultrasound System is not for use in pediatric patients.
target_condition: Arteriovenous fistulas and grafts (AVF/G) for hemodialysis vascular access
ground_truth: Three independent sonographers who manually annotated vessel presence and location in selected B-mode ultrasound images; true location established by averaging annotations across reviewers
other_metrics: Average lateral error: 0.492 mm (acceptance criterion: ≤3 mm); Average Dice Similarity Coefficient: 81.3% (acceptance criterion: ≥75%)
